title: Coloradans Against Craft Beer
headline: Join the Anti-Craft Coalition
caption:
Because who needs yet another overpriced IPA brewed with unicorn tears? Flaunt your disdain for the craft beer cult with our 'Coloradans Against Craft Beer' tee. Perfect for those who'd rather sip a PBR than engage in hop head debates. Get yours and start the revolution.

#CraftBeerWho #ColoradoSarcasm
alt_text: A black t-shirt with the text 'Coloradans Against Craft Beer' printed on it, set against a light background.

title: Coloradans Against Fourteeners
headline: Because Climbing's Overrated
caption:
Join the movement: leave the fourteeners to the climbers and rock your apathy instead. Perfect for those who’d rather sip craft beer than scale the heights. Wear it like you mean it, Coloradans.

#ColoradansAgainst #Fourteeners
alt_text: T-shirt with the phrase 'Coloradans Against Fourteeners' written on it, designed for the indifferent mountain dweller.

title: Coloradans Against Hiking
headline: For Those Who Prefer Couch Trails
caption:
Because the only thing steep around here should be a beer, not a mountainside. Join the rebellion against the relentless pursuit of elevation. Wear it like a badge of honor (or just irony).

#ColoradansAgainstHiking #SarcasmState
alt_text: A royal blue t-shirt with the phrase 'Coloradans Against Hiking' printed in bold white letters, captured in a casual outdoor setting.

title: Coloradans Against Triathlons
headline: Not Everyone's Training for a Marathon, Karen
caption:
For those of us who prefer couch-surfing over triathlons, this shirt is a necessary addition to your wardrobe. Flaunt your disdain for endurance culture and let the world know you’d rather sip a beer than run a half-mile.

#ColoradansAgainst #TriathlonNonsense
alt_text: A t-shirt with the phrase 'Coloradans Against Triathlons' printed in bold letters.
